title: Velvety Sour Croatian Custard Stir-fry
description: A unique and flavorful dish that blends the velvety texture of a custard with the sour notes and spices of Croatian cuisine, served as a savory starter or light meal.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, whisk together custard powder and chicken broth until no lumps remain.
Add sour cream and mix well. Stir in ginger paste, cilantro leaves, paprika powder, turmeric powder, and salt.
Heat some oil in a small pan over medium heat. Pour the custard mixture into the pan and stir continuously for about 2-3 minutes or until it thickens to your desired consistency.
Serve hot as a side dish with grilled meats or as an appetizer.
